package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
)

// scenario for sql_open_per_request: database/sql pools opened on request paths instead of process-level setup.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: data_access; severity: contextual.
type Rule298PositiveRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario298Positive(ctx context.Context, db *sql.DB, ids []int) error {
	for _, id := range ids {
		row := db.QueryRowContext(ctx, "select count(*) from orders where account_id=$1", id)
		var count int
		if err := row.Scan(&count); err != nil {
			return err
		}
	}
	return nil
}
